info.title: Union Street Runtime API
info.description: HTTP control-plane contract for Union Street agents, runtimes, memory, events, usage, scheduler, fleet, and webhook ingress.

runtimeBearer.description: Runtime bearer token configured with US_RUNTIME_BEARER_TOKEN or explicit server authToken.

get.summary: OpenAPI contract for the runtime HTTP API.
Runtime process state and advertised endpoints.

post.summary: Run a prompt as an agent.
Wake a peer through the runtime peer API.

get.summary: Discover model groups for an optional profile.

schema.description: Server-sent events with JSON data frames matching #/components/schemas/RuntimeEvent.

get.summary: Query usage records and summary totals.
Query recent memory anchors for a profile.
List persisted sessions for a profile.

post.summary: Claim and optionally execute due scheduler jobs.
Generate a fleet plan by prompting an agent.
